overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a scenic valley with distinctive red grass and lush vegetation, approaching an ancient stone ruin with massive snow-capped mountains in the background. The clip demonstrates high-fidelity game engine rendering with cinematic lighting and atmospheric depth.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path beside a large rocky cliff face

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with rough texture running alongside the path
worn dirt and stone trail winding through the landscape
distinctive crimson-colored tall grass swaying in the wind
hazy mountain silhouettes visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a narrow dirt path hugging a rocky cliff face. The path winds through lush green vegetation with patches of distinctive red grass visible on the right. The sky is partly cloudy with good visibility, and distant mountains are barely visible through the atmospheric haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open valley with red grass fields

events.description: exiting rocky cliffside into open grassland valley with panoramic mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking through open grasslands with distinctive red vegetation swaying in the wind on both sides

entered.detail: solitary deciduous trees with green foliage dotting the landscape
massive mountain range with white snow peaks visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide valley as the rocky cliff falls behind. The path continues through expansive fields of vibrant red grass that now flank both sides. Scattered trees appear on the horizons, and a majestic snow-capped mountain range becomes visible in the distance ahead, dominating the skyline under the partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ancient ruin in mountain valley

events.description: large ancient stone ruin structure becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large ancient ruin visible ahead in the valley

entered.detail: large ruined structure with stone columns and walls partially covered in vegetation

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the red grass fields, a massive ancient stone ruin suddenly appears on the horizon ahead. The snow-capped mountains shift to frame the sides of the view while the ruin becomes the central focal point. The path leads directly toward the structure, which grows progressively larger as the character approaches.

events.description: path curves slightly as character approaches the ruin entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the large stone ruin structure

segments.scene_description: The character draws close to the ancient ruin, which now dominates the center of the frame with its detailed stone architecture and towering columns visible. The path curves slightly as it approaches the entrance, with some trees passing out of view behind. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background, framing the impressive structure ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow cliffside path into a vast valley that culminates at the foot of a massive ancient ruin. It begins by following a character along a rocky cliff face through lush green vegetation and patches of red grass, with distant mountains obscured by atmospheric haze. As the cliff falls away, the scene opens into an expansive valley of vibrant red grass where the haze clears to reveal a majestic, snow-capped mountain range dominating the skyline. The perspective then shifts as a towering stone ruin emerges on the horizon, becoming the central focal point while the mountains move to frame the sides of the view. Finally, the camera draws close to the structure, revealing detailed stone architecture and towering columns as the path curves toward the entrance.
